_doc.purpose: Localization companion for nsfw_OvulationTrigger.json. Holds en-us entries added/updated after the source file's zh-cn text was authored, so the source file itself doesn't need to be touched again for translation-only changes.

en-us.chara_status_ovulation_trigger_tooltip: Forces the character into ovulation at the next cycle check. Yields priority to contraceptive medication.
